title: AXTranslationService
description: Service class for managing translations, loading translation files, and providing translation functionality throughout the application.

types.title: AXTranslationService

props.name: currentLang
props.description: Current language code being used for translations.

props.name: translations
props.description: Loaded translation data organized by language and scope.

props.name: defaultLang
props.description: Default language code to use when translations are not available.

props.name: fallbackLang
props.description: Fallback language code to use when current language translations are missing.

types.description: Central service for managing internationalization and translation functionality in the application.

methods.name: translate
methods.description: Translates a key to the current language with optional parameters.

methods.name: instant
methods.description: Immediately translates a key without async loading.

methods.name: setLang
methods.description: Sets the current language and loads corresponding translation files.

methods.name: loadTranslations
methods.description: Loads translation files for a specific language and scope.

methods.name: addTranslation
methods.description: Adds translation data for a specific language and scope.

methods.name: hasTranslation
methods.description: Checks if a translation key exists for the current language.

methods.name: getAvailableLangs
methods.description: Returns an array of available language codes.

methods.name: onLangChange
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when the language changes.

methods.name: onTranslationLoad
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when translations are loaded.

methods.name: onTranslationError
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when translation loading fails.

methods.name: onTranslationMissing
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when a translation key is missing.
